description_long: This is a large, decorative metal gate composed of two swinging panels, one larger and one smaller, joined at the center with a visible hinge and latch mechanism. The gate features a gently arched top and is adorned with ornate scrollwork along the upper and lower sections, adding an elegant touch. Vertical bars fill the main body of each panel, providing both security and visibility through the structure. The frame and bars are constructed from black-painted metal, likely wrought iron or steel, giving the gate a robust and durable appearance. The latch is positioned on the smaller panel, suggesting it serves as the primary access point. This type of gate is commonly found at the entrance to driveways, residential properties, or urban courtyards, often supported by adjacent pillars or fencing.
description: A large, black metal swing gate with ornate scrollwork and vertical bars, featuring two hinged panels and a central latch. The design is decorative yet sturdy, suitable for driveways or property entrances.
description_view_0: A narrow, edge-on view showing the gate's thin profile and the alignment of the two panels.
description_view_1: Front view of the gate, displaying the full decorative scrollwork, vertical bars, and the central latch on the smaller panel.
description_view_2: Another edge-on view from the opposite side, again highlighting the slim profile and the meeting point of the panels.
description_view_3: Rear view of the gate, mirroring the front but with the smaller panel on the left and the larger on the right, showing the same decorative features.
